themeRo: Cuvinte Săptămâna 5: Vremea, Hobby-uri și Emoții
themeEn: Week 5 Word List: Weather, Hobbies and Emotions

words.exampleSentence: Vremea a fost frumoasă săptămâna trecută.
words.exampleTranslation: The weather was beautiful last week.

words.exampleSentence: Soarele a strălucit toată ziua.
words.exampleTranslation: The sun shone all day long.

words.exampleSentence: A plouat cu găleata ieri după-amiază.
words.exampleTranslation: It rained heavily yesterday afternoon.

words.exampleSentence: Ninsoarea a acoperit tot orașul iarna trecută.
words.exampleTranslation: The snowfall covered the whole city last winter.

words.exampleSentence: Vântul a bătut foarte tare aseară.
words.exampleTranslation: The wind blew very hard last night.

words.exampleSentence: O furtună puternică a distrus copacii din parc.
words.exampleTranslation: A powerful storm destroyed the trees in the park.

words.exampleSentence: A căzut grindină în timpul furtunii.
words.exampleTranslation: Hail fell during the storm.

words.exampleSentence: Ceața a fost groasă dimineața.
words.exampleTranslation: The fog was thick in the morning.

words.exampleSentence: Un curcubeu frumos a apărut după ploaie.
words.exampleTranslation: A beautiful rainbow appeared after the rain.

words.exampleSentence: Temperatura a scăzut brusc luna trecută.
words.exampleTranslation: The temperature dropped suddenly last month.

words.exampleSentence: A fost foarte cald vara trecută.
words.exampleTranslation: It was very hot last summer.

words.exampleSentence: A fost rece și ploios în weekend.
words.exampleTranslation: It was cold and rainy over the weekend.

words.exampleSentence: Aerul era foarte umed după ploaie.
words.exampleTranslation: The air was very damp after the rain.

words.exampleSentence: Pământul a rămas uscat totă vara.
words.exampleTranslation: The ground stayed dry all summer.

words.exampleSentence: Cerul a fost senin în ziua aceea.
words.exampleTranslation: The sky was clear that day.

words.exampleSentence: Am călătorit mult în Europa anul trecut.
words.exampleTranslation: I traveled a lot in Europe last year.

words.exampleSentence: Am fotografiat peisaje frumoase în vacanță.
words.exampleTranslation: I photographed beautiful landscapes during the holiday.

words.exampleSentence: Am dansat toată noaptea la petrecere.
words.exampleTranslation: I danced all night at the party.

words.wordEn: to sing / to play an instrument
words.exampleSentence: A cântat la chitară când era mic.
words.exampleTranslation: He used to play the guitar when he was little.

words.exampleSentence: A pictat un tablou superb aseară.
words.exampleTranslation: She painted a wonderful painting last night.

words.exampleSentence: Am jucat fotbal cu colegii ieri.
words.exampleTranslation: I played football with my colleagues yesterday.

words.exampleSentence: Am înotat în mare în fiecare zi vara trecută.
words.exampleTranslation: I swam in the sea every day last summer.

words.exampleSentence: Am mers la plimbare în parc în fiecare seară.
words.exampleTranslation: I went for a walk in the park every evening.

words.exampleSentence: Am vizionat un film interesant vineri seara.
words.exampleTranslation: I watched an interesting film on Friday evening.

words.exampleSentence: A colecționat timbre când era copil.
words.exampleTranslation: He used to collect stamps when he was a child.

words.exampleSentence: Bunica mea tricota pulovere iarna.
words.exampleTranslation: My grandmother used to knit sweaters in winter.

words.exampleSentence: Am gătit o ciorbă delicioasă aseară.
words.exampleTranslation: I cooked a delicious soup last night.

words.exampleSentence: Am citit un roman bun săptămâna trecută.
words.exampleTranslation: I read a good novel last week.

words.exampleSentence: Am jucat șah cu tatăl meu duminică.
words.exampleTranslation: I played chess with my father on Sunday.

words.exampleSentence: Am ieșit cu prietenii în oraș sâmbătă seara.
words.exampleTranslation: I went out with friends in town on Saturday evening.

words.exampleSentence: Eram foarte fericit când am aflat vestea.
words.exampleTranslation: I was very happy when I found out the news.

words.exampleSentence: Era trist pentru că plecase prietenul lui.
words.exampleTranslation: He was sad because his friend had left.

words.exampleSentence: Am fost nervos înainte de examen.
words.exampleTranslation: I was nervous before the exam.

words.exampleSentence: Am fost surprins de cadoul pe care l-am primit.
words.exampleTranslation: I was surprised by the gift I received.

words.exampleSentence: Era dezamăgit de rezultatul examenului.
words.exampleTranslation: She was disappointed by the exam result.

words.exampleSentence: Eram entuziasmat înainte de călătorie.
words.exampleTranslation: I was excited before the trip.

words.exampleSentence: Era plictisit pentru că nu avea ce face.
words.exampleTranslation: He was bored because he had nothing to do.

words.exampleSentence: Părinții mei erau îngrijorați când am întârziat.
words.exampleTranslation: My parents were worried when I was late.

words.exampleSentence: M-am simțit relaxat după vacanță.
words.exampleTranslation: I felt relaxed after the holiday.

words.exampleSentence: Eram mulțumit de munca pe care am făcut-o.
words.exampleTranslation: I was satisfied with the work I had done.

words.exampleSentence: A alergat foarte repede la finish.
words.exampleTranslation: He ran very quickly to the finish line.

words.exampleSentence: A vorbit încet ca să nu trezească pe nimeni.
words.exampleTranslation: He spoke slowly so as not to wake anyone.

words.exampleSentence: A ascultat atent explicația profesorului.
words.exampleTranslation: She listened carefully to the teacher's explanation.

words.exampleSentence: Copiii au jucat zgomotos în curte.
words.exampleTranslation: The children played noisily in the yard.

words.exampleSentence: A citit liniștit toată după-amiaza.
words.exampleTranslation: She read quietly all afternoon.

words.exampleSentence: A rezolvat problema ușor, fără ajutor.
words.exampleTranslation: He solved the problem easily, without help.

words.exampleSentence: A învățat greu, dar a reușit la examen.
words.exampleTranslation: He studied with difficulty, but he passed the exam.

words.exampleSentence: A pronunțat corect toate cuvintele noi.
words.exampleTranslation: She pronounced all the new words correctly.

words.exampleSentence: Am scris greșit adresa pe plic.
words.exampleTranslation: I wrote the address incorrectly on the envelope.

words.exampleSentence: Am studiat împreună pentru examenul de mâine.
words.exampleTranslation: We studied together for tomorrow's exam.

phrases.phraseEn: What was the weather like yesterday?
phrases.exampleSentence: Ce vreme a fost ieri? A plouat tot ziua.
phrases.exampleTranslation: What was the weather like yesterday? It rained all day.

phrases.exampleSentence: Era cald și senin, așa că am ieșit la plimbare.
phrases.exampleTranslation: It was warm and sunny, so I went for a walk.

phrases.phraseEn: I spent my free time reading.
phrases.exampleSentence: Am petrecut timpul liber citind un roman bun.
phrases.exampleTranslation: I spent my free time reading a good novel.

phrases.exampleSentence: M-am simțit foarte fericit la petrecerea de ieri.
phrases.exampleTranslation: I felt very happy at yesterday's party.

phrases.phraseEn: The wind blew all night long.
phrases.exampleSentence: A bătut vântul toată noaptea și a plouat.
phrases.exampleTranslation: The wind blew all night and it rained.

phrases.phrase: Când eram copil, înotam în râu.
phrases.phraseEn: When I was a child, I used to swim in the river.
phrases.exampleSentence: Când eram copil, înotam în râu în fiecare vară.
phrases.exampleTranslation: When I was a child, I used to swim in the river every summer.

phrases.phraseEn: She used to sing beautifully at the piano.
phrases.exampleSentence: Ea cânta frumos la pian în fiecare seară.
phrases.exampleTranslation: She used to play the piano beautifully every evening.

phrases.phraseEn: We were worried because of the storm.
phrases.exampleSentence: Eram îngrijorați din cauza furtunii care se apropia.
phrases.exampleTranslation: We were worried because of the approaching storm.
